---
title: "Clean High School Data"
date: today
format:
  html:
	toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{python}
import polars as pl
from pyprojroot.here import here

PUBLIC_PATH = here("01_data/raw/highschool/public/EDGE_GEOCODE_PUBLICSCH_2425.csv")
PRIVATE_PATH = here("01_data/raw/highschool/private/pss2122_pu.csv")

OUT_PUBLIC = here("01_data/intermediate/hs_public_clean.csv")
OUT_PRIVATE = here("01_data/intermediate/hs_private_clean.csv")
OUT_ALL = here("01_data/intermediate/hs_all_clean.csv")
```

## Load Raw Files

```{python}
df_hs_pub_raw = pl.read_csv(PUBLIC_PATH)
df_hs_private_raw = pl.read_csv(
	PRIVATE_PATH,
	null_values=["N", "M"],
	infer_schema_length=10000,
)

print("public:", df_hs_pub_raw.shape)
print("private:", df_hs_private_raw.shape)
```

## Standardize Public School Geocodes

```{python}
df_hs_pub = (
	df_hs_pub_raw
	.select(
		"NCESSCH", "NAME", "STREET", "CITY", "STATE", "ZIP",
		"STFIP", "CNTY", "NMCNTY", "LOCALE", "LAT", "LON",
		"CBSA", "NMCBSA", "CBSATYPE", "CSA", "NMCSA", "CD", "SLDL", "SLDU", "SCHOOLYEAR"
	)
	.rename(
		{
			"NCESSCH": "school_id",
			"NAME": "school_name",
			"STREET": "street",
			"CITY": "city",
			"STATE": "state",
			"ZIP": "zip",
			"STFIP": "state_fips",
			"CNTY": "county_fips",
			"NMCNTY": "county_name",
			"LOCALE": "locale",
			"LAT": "lat",
			"LON": "lon",
			"CBSA": "cbsa",
			"NMCBSA": "nmcbsa",
			"CBSATYPE": "cbsa_type",
			"CSA": "csa",
			"NMCSA": "nmcsa",
			"CD": "cd",
			"SLDL": "sldl",
			"SLDU": "sldu",
			"SCHOOLYEAR": "school_year",
		}
	)
	.with_columns(
		pl.col("zip").cast(pl.Utf8, strict=False).str.zfill(5),
		pl.col("county_fips").cast(pl.Utf8, strict=False).str.zfill(5),
		pl.col("state_fips").cast(pl.Utf8, strict=False).str.zfill(2),
		pl.lit("public_edge").alias("source"),
	)
)
```

## Standardize Private School Geocodes (PSS)

```{python}
# Private technical doc の主要項目に対応する列を抽出
df_hs_private = (
	df_hs_private_raw
	.select(
		"PPIN", "PINST", "PADDRS", "PCITY", "PSTABB", "PZIP",
		"PCNTY22", "PCNTNM", "ULOCALE22", "LATITUDE22", "LONGITUDE22",
		"SLDLST22", "SLDUST22"
	)
	.rename(
		{
			"PPIN": "school_id",
			"PINST": "school_name",
			"PADDRS": "street",
			"PCITY": "city",
			"PSTABB": "state",
			"PZIP": "zip",
			"PCNTY22": "county_fips",
			"PCNTNM": "county_name",
			"ULOCALE22": "locale",
			"LATITUDE22": "lat",
			"LONGITUDE22": "lon",
			"SLDLST22": "sldl",
			"SLDUST22": "sldu",
		}
	)
	.with_columns(
		pl.col("zip").cast(pl.Utf8, strict=False).str.zfill(5),
		pl.col("county_fips").cast(pl.Utf8, strict=False).str.zfill(5),
		pl.lit(None).cast(pl.Utf8).alias("state_fips"),
		pl.lit(None).cast(pl.Utf8).alias("cbsa"),
		pl.lit(None).cast(pl.Utf8).alias("nmcbsa"),
		pl.lit(None).cast(pl.Utf8).alias("cbsa_type"),
		pl.lit(None).cast(pl.Utf8).alias("csa"),
		pl.lit(None).cast(pl.Utf8).alias("nmcsa"),
		pl.lit(None).cast(pl.Utf8).alias("cd"),
		pl.lit("2021-2022").alias("school_year"),
		pl.lit("private_pss").alias("source"),
	)
)
```

## Align Schema and Save

```{python}
ordered_cols = [
	"school_id", "school_name", "street", "city", "state", "zip",
	"state_fips", "county_fips", "county_name", "locale", "lat", "lon",
	"cbsa", "nmcbsa", "cbsa_type", "csa", "nmcsa", "cd", "sldl", "sldu",
	"school_year", "source"
]

df_hs_pub = df_hs_pub.select(ordered_cols)
df_hs_private = df_hs_private.select(ordered_cols)

df_hs_all = pl.concat([df_hs_pub, df_hs_private], how="vertical")

df_hs_pub.write_csv(OUT_PUBLIC)
df_hs_private.write_csv(OUT_PRIVATE)
df_hs_all.write_csv(OUT_ALL)

print("saved:", OUT_PUBLIC)
print("saved:", OUT_PRIVATE)
print("saved:", OUT_ALL)
```

## Quick Checks

```{python}
print(df_hs_pub.shape)
print(df_hs_private.shape)
print(df_hs_all.shape)

df_hs_all.select("source").group_by("source").len()
```
